cmd:
if [ -z "$N8N_API_KEY" ] || [ -z "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then echo MISSING; exit 0; fi
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,urllib.request,urllib.error,base64,os
tok=os.environ["GITHUB_TOKEN"]; key=os.environ["N8N_API_KEY"]
apib="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"; H={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key,"User-Agent":"vps"}
def req(url,data=None,method="GET",hdr=None,to=40):
    h=dict(H); h.update(hdr or {}); return urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(url,data=data,method=method,headers=h),timeout=to)
gh="https://api.github.com/repos/irynakarmazina-bot/Iryna_Karmazina/contents/n8n/cmr-draft/CMR_draft_workflow.json?ref=claude/n8n-cmr-draft-automation-8tdhbk"
wf=json.loads(base64.b64decode(json.load(req(gh,hdr={"Authorization":"token "+tok,"Accept":"application/vnd.github.v3+json"}))["content"]).decode())
body={k:wf[k] for k in ("name","nodes","connections","settings") if k in wf}
r=req(apib+"/workflows/mVC0K0ymEiB6DuiT",data=json.dumps(body).encode(),method="PUT",hdr={"Content-Type":"application/json"})
resp=json.load(r)
fe=[n["parameters"].get("fromEmail") for n in body["nodes"] if n["name"]=="Відповідь (SMTP)"]
print("PUT ok active="+str(resp.get("active"))+" fromEmail="+str(fe))
PY
